title: PresentationModel
description: Redacted, renderer-only view of findings/trace (ADR-0016 §3): what templates/explain/report.md consume. Mirrors DecisionRecord's findings exactly (same finding shape, reused by $ref) — no raw fact value (the finding shape has no such field) and no rendered markdown (rendering stays a separate concern, ADR-0016 §4; additionalProperties: false leaves no room for one).
